data.title: Bitcoin Holds $75,000 As Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Gain 2%
data.description: Bitcoin's price continues to hold above $75,000, with Ethereum following at $2,352. On Thursday, Bitcoin ETFs saw $26.05 million in net inflows, while Ethereum ETFs reported $18 million in net inflows. Solana is valued at $87.67, XRP at $1.43, Dogecoin at $0.09807, and Shiba Inu at $0.00056200. Meme coin market capitalization surged by 7.5% in the last 24 hours to reach $38.4 billion. Commentary from a crypto analyst is included in the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Deutsche Lufthansa AG: Release according to Article 40 (1) of the WpHG (the German Securities Trading Act) with the objective of Europe-wide distribution
data.description: Deutsche Lufthansa AG has announced a release in accordance with Article 40 (1) of the German Securities Trading Act (WpHG) with the aim of distributing it across Europe.

data.title: CTW Cayman to Hold Annual General Meeting on May 7, 2026: Shareholders to Vote on Corporate Name Change and Amended Articles
data.description: The annual general meeting of CTW Cayman is scheduled to take place on May 7, 2026. At this meeting, shareholders will have the opportunity to vote on a proposed corporate name change and amendments to the company's articles.
Treasury Bonds auction closes with RIKS 29 0917 and RIKS 37 0115 reaching record highs.

data.title: WEBUY GLOBAL LTD. Launches Exclusive Antarctica Expedition Cruise Under Premium Brand Altitude Travel, Achieves Over US$777,500 in First Month Total Transaction Value
data.description: Altitude Travel, a subsidiary of Webuy, has unveiled a new premium Antarctica cruise experience. In its first month, the venture has generated an impressive transaction value exceeding US$777,500. This move marks an expansion in the realm of premium travel and showcases the company's commitment to offering high-end experiences to its customers.

data.title: PMGC Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: ELAB) Secures $40 Million Equity Purchase Facility Agreement: Announces Ability To Accelerate M&A Strategy Currently Focused on Acquiring Aerospace and Defense Manufacturing Companies
data.description: PMGC Holdings, Inc. has successfully secured an Equity Purchase Facility Agreement totaling $40 million. This milestone, listed under Nasdaq as ELAB, will empower the company to expedite its merger and acquisition strategy, particularly concentrated on the current market scenario.

data.title: Medicus Pharma Submits Orphan Drug Designation Application to U.S. FDA for SkinJect® in Gorlin Syndrome
data.description: Aiming to address a rare and high-burden genetic condition that lacks approved therapies, researchers are making strides in developing a non-surgical treatment approach for recurrent basal cell carcinoma. This advancement is significant, as the condition impacts a substantial number of individuals globally and currently lacks effective therapeutic options. The new strategy holds promise for improving outcomes and quality of life for patients dealing with these challenging conditions.

data.title: Repligen Opens European Training & Innovation Center in Breda, Expanding Global Customer Support Network
data.description: WALTHAM, Massachusetts - April 17, 2026 - Repligen Corporation revealed the inauguration of a new facility, the Repligen Training & Innovation Center (RTIC), located at its OPUS® Pre-packed Chromatography Columns manufacturing site in Breda, the Netherlands. As a leading life sciences company specializing in bioprocessing technology, Repligen aims to offer enhanced customer support through the RTIC. The center comprises exhibit spaces and custom demonstration areas to provide clients with practical experience and guidance related to Repligen's cutting-edge bioprocessing solutions. This initiative demonstrates the company's commitment to innovation and customer satisfaction.

data.title: APi Group Announces the Acquisition of Wtech Fire Group
data.description: A definitive agreement has been reached by APi Group Corporation (NYSE: APG) to acquire Wtech Fire Group, a leading European provider of fire protection solutions. The acquisition is anticipated to be finalized in the latter half of 2026, pending customary closing procedures and regulatory authorizations. Wtech, based in Ireland, specializes in fire protection, suppression, and detection services.

data.title: Surf Air Mobility Completes Implementation of Safety Management System for Part 135 Airline Operations
data.description: Surf Air Mobility Inc., a prominent air mobility platform traded on the NYSE under the ticker symbol SRFM, disclosed that their airline operations, utilizing the Southern Airways Express operating certificate, have officially submitted a declaration confirming compliance with 14CFR Part 5. This signifies the successful implementation of the Company's Safety Management System (SMS). The completion of this milestone is considered a significant accomplishment for the Company's Part 135 commuter operations.

data.title: Alterity Therapeutics Appoints Highly Experienced Biotech Executive Ann Cunningham to its Board of Directors
data.description: Alterity Therapeutics, a biotechnology company focused on developing disease-modifying treatments for neurodegenerative diseases, has recently appointed Ms. Ann Cunningham to its Board of Directors as an independent Non-Executive Director. This addition, effective April 17, 2026, enhances Alterity's Board composition, bringing valuable global commercial and strategic expertise onboard as the company progresses towards late-stage development in Multiple System Atrophy (MSA). Alterity Therapeutics is listed on the ASX as ATH and on the NASDAQ as ATHE.
